mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_operate_log( admin_id, account, name, operate_time, ip, description, api, param, result, module, type ) value ( #{log.adminId}, #{log.account}, #{log.name}, #{log.operateTime}, #{log.ip}, #{log.description}, #{log.api}, #{log.param}, #{log.result}, #{log.module}, #{log.type} )
mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM sys_login_log
AND login_time BETWEEN #{param.startTime} AND #{param.endTime} AND ((account LIKE CONCAT('%',#{param.keyword},'%')) OR (name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{param.keyword},'%'))) AND ip LIKE CONCAT('%',#{param.ip},'%')
ORDER BY id DESC

SELECT * FROM sys_operate_log
AND operate_time BETWEEN #{param.startTime} AND #{param.endTime} AND ((account LIKE CONCAT('%',#{param.keyword},'%')) OR (name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{param.keyword},'%'))) AND ip LIKE CONCAT('%',#{param.ip},'%') AND module LIKE CONCAT('%',#{param.module},'%') AND description LIKE CONCAT('%',#{param.description},'%')
ORDER BY id DESC
